plugins.name: agent-compat
plugins.description: Generate compact Codex and Claude routing stubs with per-agent references from Copilot *.agent.md custom agents.

plugins.name: assumption-killer
plugins.description: Force agents to identify, verify, and record assumptions before implementation.

plugins.description: Help engineers adopt coding agents through safe confidence levels and reviewable sessions.

plugins.description: Turn happy-path web flows into gremlin UX resilience test plans and starter Playwright specs.
